changeSet.author: finvault

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = 'analyst'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id) SELECT u.id, r.id FROM users u, roles r WHERE u.username = 'analyst' AND r.name = 'ROLE_ANALYST'

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'analyst')

changeSet.author: finvault

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = 'viewer'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id) SELECT u.id, r.id FROM users u, roles r WHERE u.username = 'viewer' AND r.name = 'ROLE_VIEWER'

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'viewer')

changeSet.author: finvault

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM financial_records WHERE created_by_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'admin')
